title: Plan: Implement Mission Control kanban orphan-row filter per ADR-2026-05-15-1200 and spec docs/specs/kanban-hide-drained-orphans.md. Frontend in hex-nexus/assets/src/components/views/MissionControl.tsx (Solid.js). Add reactive isOrphaned() check, hide auto-drained orphaned rows from Ready+Failed lanes, show collapsible 'N tasks auto-drained' banner, default collapsed. Rebuild hex-nexus binary after asset change. No backend schema change.
